candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue line and preferred candidate.
Balancing row, not an actual reported revenue line; only a fallback if needed.

variables.notes: Selected the reported top-line revenue label; excluded balancing item.

candidates.row_label: Provisions, direct assignment and production costs
candidates.why: Best matching direct cost line in the income statement; appears to represent direct assignment/production costs closest to cost of sales.

final_choice.row_label: Provisions, direct assignment and production costs

variables.notes: No candidate list was provided for COGS. Chose from the A-column preview because this is the closest semantic match to direct production/service costs. Manual review recommended since the label is somewhat company-specific and not explicitly named cost of sales.

candidates.why: Clear overhead component and preferred candidate.
Overhead bucket and preferred candidate; choose the populated reported row, not balancing/total rows.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Used component overhead rows. Added 'Other external expenses' from the full preview because it is a strong SG&A-type overhead line but was missing from the candidate list. Excluded COGS-like direct costs, depreciation/amortization, impairments, interest, and total rows. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other external expenses

candidates.row_label: Impairment of development and project properties
candidates.why: This is an impairment charge, not recurring R&D expense, so it does not match XRD.
Balance sheet asset line, not an income statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear R&D expense line exists in the provided statements. Candidate labels do not match the XRD concept.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line and best match.
Balancing line, not preferred unless needed as fallback.
Broader finance expense line; fallback only if direct interest expense missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component, narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, narrower and less preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list: direct interest expense first; broader finance expense second if labeling changes; lease-interest line last as a narrower fallback. Excluded balancing and supplemental rows from final choice.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests, matching BE rule.
Includes non-controlling interests, so inferior when owner equity is available.
Balancing line, not an actual equity measure.
Total balance sheet line, not equity.
Total balance sheet line, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Selected parent-company equity to avoid double counting non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet NCI line and preferred for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet label; useful fallback if label changes across years.
Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance sheet minority interest.
Income statement allocation of earnings, not balance sheet minority interest.
